element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic threat identification against blank backdrop; no environmental distraction
Constraint-based learning: must distinguish target from non-target; penalties for shooting innocents
Environmental complexity added; targets emerge from scenery; visual noise increases discrimination difficulty
Increased cognitive load; simultaneous multiple threats vs. sequential wall presentation
Rhythm change from discrimination to trajectory prediction; limited ammo management; score optimization
Escalating reaction time demand; cumulative difficulty compounding previous elements

typical_relief_triggers: Blank wall backdrop (rounds 1-5) - minimal visual noise
Bonus round transition - shifts from life-threat to score optimization
Successful discrimination sequences - player agency confirmed
typical_tension_triggers: Innocent NPC presence - creates penalty risk on every shot decision
City block emergence (round 6) - visual complexity spike
Speed increase post-bonus - reaction time pressure escalates
Multiple simultaneous targets - cognitive load in city block rounds
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Graduated escalation: safe discrimination → environmental complexity → density increase → speed multiplier. Relief provided by bonus round mode shift before cycle repeats at higher difficulty.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Rounds 1-5 (wall rounds): Minimal visual distraction; three targets per round. Pure discrimination learning without environmental factors. Establishes threat recognition baseline.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Rounds 6-10 (city block rounds): Backdrop complexity introduced; five targets per round; targets emerge from scenery rather than appearing in open space. Difficulty compounds previous learning with visual noise.
difficulty_curve.late_game: Rounds 11+ (speed-escalated cycles): Speed increase applied after bonus round; same room variations repeat at accelerated pace. Reaction time becomes primary limiting factor; accuracy maintained through repeated pattern exposure.
notable_spikes: Round 6 transition: City block backdrop debut creates sudden visual complexity spike
Post-bonus round: Speed increase is non-telegraphed difficulty multiplier
Accumulated fatigue: Later cycles test sustained reaction time over extended play

notable_level_patterns.description: Three cardboard cutouts appear against blank white wall backdrop. Mixed gangster/innocent distribution. Player must react quickly and accurately identify targets. Low visual noise maximizes pure threat-recognition learning.
Five cardboard cutouts emerge from urban scenery backdrop. Visual noise from buildings/environment adds discrimination difficulty. Tests ability to isolate targets from environmental context.

Shift from discrimination to trajectory prediction. Ten tin cans thrown across screen; player bounces them onto ledges for points. Unlimited ammo removes life-threat tension. Reward mechanic for previous performance. Score-optimization mode.
After bonus round completion, wall and city block rounds repeat at increased speed. No new mechanics introduced; escalation via reaction time demand. Cycles continue until player loses all lives.
